executives.name: Vandita Pant
executives.background: Vandita Pant was appointed Chief Financial Officer in March 2024. She previously served as Chief Commercial Officer and has extensive experience in banking and finance across Asia and Europe.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Director, Head of Strategy, Global Markets
